sharc
Documentation développeur
Launcher.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Collections;
3 using System.Collections.Generic;
4 using System.Diagnostics;
5 using System.Text;
6 using System.IO;
7 using System.Linq;
8 using System.Globalization;
9 using System.Reflection;
10 using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
11 using System.Runtime.Loader;
12 
13 // TODO --ignore-current-environment ou --reset-env uniquement sous Linux
14 // TODO reformat files by replacing spaces <=> tabs
15 // TODO les export successifs qui ajoutent des données sur une même variable d'environnement peuvent être conflictuels car exécutés sans prise en compte de la mise à jour de la valeur
16 
17 namespace ApplicationLauncher
18 {
19  #region EXCEPTION
20  [Serializable]
21  public class LauncherException : Exception
22  {
23  public LauncherException (string message)
24  : base(message)
25  {
26  ;
27  }
28  }
29 
30  [Serializable]
31  public class InternalException : Exception
32  {
33  public InternalException (string message)
34  : base(message)
35  {
36  ;
37  }
38  }
39 
40  [Serializable]
41  public class ExitException : Exception
42  {
43  public ExitException (string message)
44  : base(message)
45  {
46  ;
47  }
48  }
49 
50  [Serializable]
51  public class HelpException : Exception
52  {
53  public HelpException (string message)
54  : base(message)
55  {
56  ;
57  }
58  }
59  #endregion
60 
61 
62  public class Launcher
63  {
64  #region CONFIGURATIONS
65  private readonly string mpirun_linux_default = "mpirun";
66  private readonly string[] mpirun_linux_default_options = { };
67  private readonly string mpirun_windows_default = "mpiexec.exe";
68  private readonly string[] mpirun_windows_default_options = { "--delegate" };
69  private readonly Version mpirun_required_version = new Version ("4.0.2");
70  #endregion
71 
72  public enum InternalDebugMode
73  {
74  None,
75  Info,
76  Test,
77  Echo }
78  ;
79 
80  public interface ILauncherOptions
81  {
82  bool dry_mode { get; }
83 
84  bool verbose_run { get; }
85 
86  bool check_mode { get; }
87 
88  string output_file { get; }
89 
90  InternalDebugMode internal_debug { get; }
91 
92  string install_path { get; }
93 
94  string rootDir { get; }
95 
96  string binaryDir { get; }
97 
98  string libDir { get; }
99 
100  int nb_proc { get; }
101 
102  string mpirun_path { get; }
103 
104  string mpirt_path { get; }
105 
106  List<string> mpirun_extra_options { get; }
107  }
108 
109  private class LauncherOptions : ILauncherOptions
110  {
111  public LauncherOptions ()
112  {
113  dry_mode = false;
114  verbose_run = false;
115  check_mode = false;
116  output_file = null;
117  internal_debug = InternalDebugMode.None;
118  install_path = null;
119  rootDir = null;
120  binaryDir = null;
121  libDir = null;
122 
123  nb_proc = 1;
124  mpirun_path = null;
125  mpirt_path = null;
126  mpirun_extra_options = new List<string> ();
127  }
128 
129  public bool dry_mode { get; set; }
130 
131  public bool verbose_run { get; set; }
132 
133  public bool check_mode { get; set; }
134 
135  public string output_file { get; set; }
136 
137  public InternalDebugMode internal_debug { get; set; }
138 
139  public string install_path { get; set; }
140 
141  public int nb_proc { get; set; }
142 
143  public string mpirun_path { get; set; }
144 
145  public string mpirt_path { get; set; }
146 
147  public List<string> mpirun_extra_options { get; set; }
148 
149  public string rootDir { get; set; }
150 
151  public string binaryDir { get; set; }
152 
153  public string libDir { get; set; }
154  }
155 
156  #region OPTIONS WITH DEFAULT VALUES
157  private bool show_help = false;
158  private string parameters; // file.arc
159  #endregion
160 
161  #region MEMBERS
162  private Application.ILoader loader = null;
163  private Mono.Options.OptionSet opt_set = null;
164  private static LauncherOptions options = null;
165  private List<Application.IAction> actions = new List<Application.IAction> ();
166  #endregion
167 
168  public static ILauncherOptions Options { get { return options; } }
169 
170 
171 
172 
173  #region CONSTRUCTOR
174  public Launcher ()
175  {
176  options = new LauncherOptions ();
177 
178  string assembly_name = "Application";
179  // Si log : pb avec --internal-debug=test
180  // Logger.log(Logger.Channel.Dev, "Loading {0} Assembly",assembly_name);
181  Assembly ass = AssemblyLoadContext.Default.LoadFromAssemblyPath(AppContext.BaseDirectory + assembly_name + ".dll");
182  if (ass == null)
183  throw new LauncherException (String.Format ("Cannot load {0} Assembly", assembly_name));
184  Type ObjType = ass.GetType (assembly_name + ".Loader");
185  //Type ObjType = ass.GetType ("Application.Loader");
186  if (ObjType == null)
187  throw new LauncherException (String.Format ("Cannot load {0}.Loader Object", assembly_name));
188  loader = (Application.ILoader)Activator.CreateInstance (ObjType);
189  actions.AddRange (loader.Load ());
190  // Logger.log(Logger.Channel.Dev, "{0} Assembly loaded", assembly_name);
191 
192  setupOptions ();
193  }
194  #endregion
195 
196  #region OPTIONS
197  private void setupOptions ()
198  {
199  // Fix Invariant culture (US) for data representation and floating number parsing
200  System.Threading.Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture = CultureInfo.InvariantCulture;
201 
202  opt_set = new Mono.Options.OptionSet ();
203 
204  foreach (Application.IAction action in actions) {
205  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Starting Setup action for {0} component", action.Name);
206  action.Setup (ref opt_set);
207  }
208 
209  if (loader.EnableParallelMode) {
210  opt_set.Add ("n|mpirun-nproc=", "define required processor number in simulation mode\n(only one used in forecast mode)", (int n) => {
211  options.nb_proc = n; });
212  if (ExecTools.isWindows ()) {
213  opt_set.Add ("mpirun=", String.Format ("select Intel MPI launcher command\n(Windows default is {0}; requires version {1} or more)", mpirun_windows_default, mpirun_required_version),
214  (string path) => {
215  options.mpirun_path = path; });
216  } else {
217  opt_set.Add ("mpirun=", String.Format ("select Intel MPI launcher command\nLauncher command may contain options which will be prepended to mpirun-options\n(Linux default is {0}; requires version {1} or more)", mpirun_linux_default, mpirun_required_version),
218  (string path) => {
219  options.mpirun_path = path; });
220  opt_set.Add("mpirt-path=", "add a directory containing the mpi runtime and libraries (in mpirt-path/bin64) \n(default or if mpirun missing in mpirt-path/bin/64: mpirt is taken in the loaded env if available or searched in install_path/bin/mpirt)", (string s) => { options.mpirt_path = s; });
221  }
222 
223  {
224  string[] mpirun_default_options = (ExecTools.isWindows ()) ? mpirun_windows_default_options : mpirun_linux_default_options;
225  string default_options_string = String.Join ("', '", mpirun_default_options);
226  if (mpirun_default_options.Length == 0)
227  default_options_string = "is empty";
228  else if (mpirun_default_options.Length == 1)
229  default_options_string = String.Format ("is '{0}'", default_options_string);
230  else
231  default_options_string = String.Format ("are '{0}'", default_options_string);
232  opt_set.Add ("x|mpirun-options=", "Add one extra option for mpirun command; this option may be repeated; default " + default_options_string,
233  (string options) => {
234  Launcher.options.mpirun_extra_options.Add (options); });
235  }
236  }
237 
238  opt_set.Add ("o|output-file=", "filename to save all console output (default is disabled)", (string s) => {
239  options.output_file = s;
240  Logger.configureOutputFile (s); });
241  opt_set.Add ("d|dry", "dry mode; simulate a run sequence", v => {
242  options.dry_mode = true; });
243  opt_set.Add ("v|verbose", "verbose run mode", v => {
244  options.verbose_run = true; });
245  opt_set.Add ("h|help|?", "This help page\nThen, parameters.arc is optional\n", v => {
246  show_help = true; });
247 
248  opt_set.Add ("internal-debug:", "enable launcher internal debug infos\nChoose one between info, test and echo (default is 'info')", (string v) => {
249  configureInternalDebug (v); });
250  opt_set.Add ("install-path=", "select a root directory for installation\n(default is launcher directory)", (string s) => {
251  options.install_path = s; });
252  opt_set.Add ("check", "check installation", v => {
253  options.check_mode = true; });
254  }
255 
256  public void parseArguments (string[] args)
257  {
258  try {
259  List<string> remaining_args = opt_set.Parse (args);
260 
261  // Check if remaining args looks like options
262  for (int i=0; i<remaining_args.Count; ++i) {
263  String arg = remaining_args [i];
264  if (arg.Substring (0, 1) == "-")
265  throw new Mono.Options.OptionException (String.Format ("Invalid argument {0}", arg), arg);
266  }
267 
268  if (show_help) {
269  showHelpAndExit ();
270  } else if (options.internal_debug == InternalDebugMode.Echo) {
271  if (remaining_args.Count > 0)
272  Console.Write (remaining_args [0]);
273  Environment.Exit (0);
274  } else if (options.internal_debug == InternalDebugMode.Test) {
275  testInternalDebug ();
276  } else if (remaining_args.Count == 0 && options.check_mode) {
277  ; // check only : no run()
278  } else if (remaining_args.Count == 1) {
279  parameters = remaining_args [0];
280  }
281 
282  bool has_error = false;
283  has_error |= configureExecution ();
284  if (loader.EnableParallelMode) {
285  has_error |= configureParallel ();
286  }
287 
288  foreach (Application.IAction action in actions) {
289  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Starting Configure action for {0} component", action.Name);
290  has_error |= action.Configure ();
291  }
292 
293  if (has_error)
294  throw new LauncherException("Application configuration failed");
295  } catch (Mono.Options.OptionException e) {
296  showHelpAndExit (e.Message);
297  } catch (HelpException e) {
298  showHelpAndExit (e.Message);
299  }
300  }
301 
302  #region EXECUTION SEQUENCES
303  public void Run ()
304  {
305  try {
306  List<Application.IAction>.Enumerator enumerator = actions.GetEnumerator ();
307  Application.ActionSequence nextAction = Application.ActionSequence.Continue;
308  while (nextAction == Application.ActionSequence.Continue && enumerator.MoveNext()) {
309  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Starting Run on {0} component", enumerator.Current.Name);
310  nextAction = enumerator.Current.Run (parameters);
311  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Returned action after Run action on {0} component is {1}", enumerator.Current.Name, nextAction);
312  switch (nextAction) {
313  case Application.ActionSequence.Continue:
314  // nothing to do
315  break;
316  case Application.ActionSequence.Stop:
317  // stop and stop ok
318  break;
319  case Application.ActionSequence.Loop:
320  enumerator = actions.GetEnumerator ();
321  nextAction = Application.ActionSequence.Continue;
322  break;
323  case Application.ActionSequence.Abort:
324  throw new LauncherException ("Run aborted");
325  }
326  }
327  } catch (HelpException e) {
328  showHelpAndExit (e.Message);
329  }
330  }
331  #endregion
332 
333  private void showHelpAndExit (String message = null)
334  {
335  StringWriter writer = new StringWriter ();
336  if (message == null)
337  writer.WriteLine ("Requested Help page");
338  else
339  writer.WriteLine (message);
340 
341  writer.WriteLine ("Usage: {0} [options] [--] [parameter]", Path.GetFileName (System.Diagnostics.Process.GetCurrentProcess ().ProcessName));
342  writer.WriteLine ("Options : ");
343  opt_set.WriteOptionDescriptions (writer);
344 
345  if (message == null)
346  throw new ExitException (writer.ToString ());
347  else
348  throw new LauncherException (writer.ToString ());
349  }
350 
351  private void configureInternalDebug (string v)
352  {
353  if (v == null) {
354  options.internal_debug = InternalDebugMode.Info;
355  } else if (v == "info") {
356  options.internal_debug = InternalDebugMode.Info;
357  } else if (v == "test") {
358  options.internal_debug = InternalDebugMode.Test;
359  } else if (v == "echo") {
360  options.internal_debug = InternalDebugMode.Echo;
361  } else {
362  showHelpAndExit (String.Format ("Invalid internal-debug option [{0}]", v));
363  }
364 
365  if (options.internal_debug == InternalDebugMode.Info)
366  Logger.configureEnableDebug (true);
367  }
368 
369  private bool configureExecution ()
370  {
371  bool has_error = false;
372 
373  if (options.install_path != null) {
374  if (!ExecTools.isWindows ()) { // Sous Linux, interprétation de ~ en tant que $HOME
375  if (options.install_path.StartsWith ("~")) {
376  string home_path = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable ("HOME");
377  if (home_path == null) {
378  throw new LauncherException ("Cannot interpret ~ since $HOME is not defined");
379  }
380  options.install_path = home_path + options.install_path.Substring (1);
381  }
382  }
383  options.rootDir = Path.GetFullPath (options.install_path);
384  } else {
385  String execFileName = Process.GetCurrentProcess ().MainModule.FileName;
386  options.rootDir = Path.GetDirectoryName (execFileName);
387  }
388 
389  options.binaryDir = Path.Combine (options.rootDir, "bin");
390 
391  if (!ExecTools.isWindows ()) {
392  string LD_LIBRARY_PATH = Path.Combine (Launcher.Options.rootDir, "lib");
393  if (Directory.Exists (LD_LIBRARY_PATH)) {
394  options.libDir = LD_LIBRARY_PATH;
395  } else if (Launcher.Options.check_mode) {
396  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Error, "Standard library directory '{0}' cannot be found", LD_LIBRARY_PATH);
397  has_error = true;
398  } else {
399  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Warning, "Standard library directory '{0}' cannot be found", LD_LIBRARY_PATH);
400  }
401  }
402 
403  if (!has_error)
404  options.install_path = options.rootDir;
405  return has_error;
406  }
407 
408  private bool configureParallel ()
409  {
410  Env.CreateTag ("Mpi", "Parallel environment");
411 
412  // Prépare mpd.conf (uniquement activé sous Linux)
413  if (!ExecTools.isWindows ()) {
414  try {
415  //.NET 3.5 does not have System.Environment.SpecialFolder.UserProfile
416  String home_path = System.Environment.GetFolderPath (System.Environment.SpecialFolder.Personal);
417  String path = Path.Combine (home_path, @".mpd.conf"); // TODO: vérifier l'écriture du fichier
418 
419  // Delete the file if it exists.
420  if (File.Exists (path)) {
421  if (options.internal_debug == InternalDebugMode.Info)
422  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Warning, "mpd will use existing " + path + " file");
423  } else {
424  string secret = "secretword=visco";
425  if (options.internal_debug == InternalDebugMode.Info)
426  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Setting \"{1}\" into {0}", path, secret);
427 
428  //Create the file.
429  using (FileStream fs = File.Create(path)) {
430  byte[] info = new UTF8Encoding (true).GetBytes (secret);
431  fs.Write (info, 0, info.Length);
432  }
433  }
434 
435  int ret = ExecTools.ExecProcess ("/bin/chmod", ExecTools.toArgs ("600", path));
436  if (ret != 0) {
437  throw new Exception (String.Format ("Cannot update permissions for file {0}", path));
438  }
439 
440  } catch (Exception ex) {
441  throw new LauncherException (String.Format ("MPI configuration failure : {0}", ex.Message));
442  }
443  }
444 
445  // Prépare et teste MPI runtime
446  using (Process p = new Process()) {
447  p.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false;
448 
449  bool empty_extra_options = (options.mpirun_extra_options.Count == 0);
450 
451  string mpirt_exe_dir = null;
452  string mpirt_lib_dir = null;
453  string libfab_dir = null;
454  string fi_prov_dir = null;
455 
456  // Handle mpi runtime user location if given
457  if (options.mpirt_path != null) {
458  mpirt_exe_dir = Path.Combine(options.mpirt_path, "bin");
459  mpirt_lib_dir = Path.Combine(options.mpirt_path, "lib;");
460  mpirt_lib_dir += Path.Combine(options.mpirt_path, "lib/release;");
461  mpirt_lib_dir += Path.Combine(options.mpirt_path, "libfabric/lib");
462  Env.Export(Env.GetTag("Mpi"), "LD_LIBRARY_PATH", mpirt_lib_dir);
463  libfab_dir = Path.Combine(options.mpirt_path, "libfabric/lib");
464  Env.Export(Env.GetTag("Mpi"), "LIBRARY_PATH", libfab_dir);
465  fi_prov_dir = Path.Combine(options.mpirt_path, "libfabric/lib/prov");
466  Env.Export(Env.GetTag("Mpi"), "FI_PROVIDER_PATH", fi_prov_dir);
467  }
468 
469  if (options.mpirun_path != null) {
470  if (!ExecTools.isWindows ()) {
471  Regex regex = new Regex (@"^(?<cmd>'[^']*'|""[^""]*""|[^""'\s]+)\s*(?<arg>.*)$", RegexOptions.None);
472  Match m = regex.Match (options.mpirun_path);
473  if (m.Success) {
474  options.mpirun_path = m.Groups ["cmd"].Value;
475  string arg = m.Groups ["arg"].Value;
476  options.mpirun_extra_options.Insert (0, arg);
477  } else {
478  throw new LauncherException (String.Format ("Cannot parse mpirun command '{0}'", options.mpirun_path));
479  }
480  }
481  else { // windows
482  string mpirt_dir=Path.GetDirectoryName(options.mpirun_path);
483  Env.Export(Env.GetTag ("Mpi"), "PATH",mpirt_dir + Path.PathSeparator + Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable ("PATH"));
484  }
485  if (File.Exists (options.mpirun_path)) {
486  p.StartInfo.FileName = options.mpirun_path;
487  } else {
488  p.StartInfo.FileName = ExecTools.FindExec (options.mpirun_path);
489  }
490  } else if (ExecTools.isWindows ()) {
491  options.mpirun_path = mpirun_windows_default;
492  p.StartInfo.FileName = ExecTools.FindExec (options.mpirun_path);
493  } else { // Linux
494  string mpirt_dir = (mpirt_exe_dir != null) ? mpirt_exe_dir : Path.Combine (options.install_path, "bin", "mpirt");
495  string mpirt_run = Path.Combine (mpirt_dir, mpirun_linux_default);
496  if (File.Exists (mpirt_run)) {
497  options.mpirun_path = String.Format ("embedded {0}", mpirun_linux_default);
498  p.StartInfo.FileName = mpirt_run;
499  Env.Export (Env.GetTag ("Mpi"), "I_MPI_ROOT", mpirt_dir);
500  Env.Export (Env.GetTag ("Mpi"), "PATH", mpirt_dir + Path.PathSeparator + Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable ("PATH"));
501  } else {
502  options.mpirun_path = mpirun_linux_default;
503  p.StartInfo.FileName = ExecTools.FindExec (options.mpirun_path);
504  }
505  }
506 
507  if (empty_extra_options) {
508  // Add default extra options (these options are appended to options provided by mpirun_path command)
509  if (ExecTools.isWindows ()) {
510  options.mpirun_extra_options.AddRange (mpirun_windows_default_options);
511  } else {
512  options.mpirun_extra_options.AddRange (mpirun_linux_default_options);
513  }
514  }
515 
516  if (p.StartInfo.FileName == null || !File.Exists (p.StartInfo.FileName)) {
517  throw new LauncherException (String.Format ("MPI configuration failure : cannot find MPI launcher [{0}]", options.mpirun_path));
518  }
519 
520  Env.LoadEnvironment (p.StartInfo, new Env.Tag[] { Env.GetTag ("Mpi") });
521 
522  List<string> args = new List<string> ();
523  args.Add ("--version");
524  args.AddRange (options.mpirun_extra_options);
525  p.StartInfo.Arguments = ExecTools.argvToCommandLine (args);
526 
527  try {
528  if (!options.dry_mode || options.check_mode) {
529  if (options.verbose_run)
530  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Verbose, "Execute: {0} {1}", p.StartInfo.FileName, p.StartInfo.Arguments);
531 
532  p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true;
533  p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardError = true;
534 
535  List<string> mpirun_version_output = null;
536 
537  if (options.check_mode) {
538  mpirun_version_output = new List<string> ();
539  p.OutputDataReceived += (sender, arg) => {
540  if (arg.Data != null) {
541  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.MPIInfo, arg.Data);
542  mpirun_version_output.Add (arg.Data);
543  } };
544  p.ErrorDataReceived += (sender, arg) => {
545  if (arg.Data != null) {
546  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.MPIInfo, arg.Data);
547  } };
548  } else {
549  p.OutputDataReceived += (sender, arg) => { };
550  p.ErrorDataReceived += (sender, arg) => { };
551  }
552 
553  p.Start ();
554  p.BeginOutputReadLine ();
555  p.BeginErrorReadLine ();
556  p.WaitForExit ();
557  int r = p.ExitCode;
558  if (r != 0)
559  throw new Exception (String.Format ("abnormal return code [{0}]", r));
560 
561  // Check intel mpi required
562  if (mpirun_version_output != null) {
563  Regex regex = new Regex (@"Version (?<major>\d+)\.(?<minor>\d+) Update (?<update>\d+) ", RegexOptions.None);
564  foreach (string line in mpirun_version_output) {
565  Match m = regex.Match (line);
566  if (m.Success) {
567  Version current_version = new Version (String.Format ("{0}.{1}.{2}",
568  m.Groups ["major"].Value,
569  m.Groups ["minor"].Value,
570  m.Groups ["update"].Value));
571  int comparaison = current_version.CompareTo (mpirun_required_version);
572  if (comparaison < 0)
573  throw new LauncherException ("MPI version requirement failed : found " + current_version.ToString () + "; required " + mpirun_required_version.ToString ());
574  break;
575  }
576  }
577  }
578  } else {
579  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Dry, "Execute; {0} {1}", p.StartInfo.FileName, p.StartInfo.Arguments);
580  }
581  } catch (Exception e) {
582  throw new LauncherException ("MPI configuration failure : " + e.Message);
583  }
584  options.mpirun_path = p.StartInfo.FileName;
585  if (options.check_mode) {
586  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.MPIInfo, "Runtime found at location '{0}'", options.mpirun_path);
587  }
588  }
589 
590  if (options.nb_proc <= 0) {
591  showHelpAndExit ("Error: nb proc should be >= 1");
592  }
593 
594  return false; // no configuration error
595  }
596  #endregion
597 
598  private void testInternalDebug ()
599  {
600  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Testing internal procedures");
601 
602  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Argument conversion...");
603  System.Diagnostics.Process proc = new System.Diagnostics.Process ();
604 
605  // List<string> names = new List<string>();
606  // names.Add (System.Diagnostics.Process.GetCurrentProcess().ProcessName); // native (Assembly); assembly (mono)
607  // names.Add (System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly ().GetName().Name); // ko native (Assembly); ko assembly (Assembly)
608  // names.Add (System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly ().Location); // ko native (Assembly.exe) : ok assembly (Path/Assembly.exe)
609  // names.Add (System.Reflection.Assembly.GetEntryAssembly().Location); // similar to GetExecutingAssembly
610  // names.Add (System.Reflection.Assembly.GetCallingAssembly().Location); // similar to GetExecutingAssembly
611  // names.Add (System.Diagnostics.Process.GetCurrentProcess().MainModule.FileName); // ok pour native (Path/Assembly); ko assembly
612  // names.Add (Environment.GetCommandLineArgs()[0]); // ko native (BadPath/Assembly.exe) ; ok assembly
613  // names.Add (Path.GetFileName(System.Windows.Forms.Application.ExecutablePath));
614  // names.Add (System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.FriendlyName); // ko native (Assembly.exe) ; ok assembly
615  // names.Add (System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly ().CodeBase); // ko (file://Path/Assembly.exe)
616  // names.Add (System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly ().GetName().FullName); // ko (ArcTemLauncher, Version=1.0.5350.25248 ...)
617  // foreach(string s in names) { log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "Name = {0}",s); }
618 
619  string processPath = System.Diagnostics.Process.GetCurrentProcess ().MainModule.FileName;
620  string assemblyLocation = AppContext.BaseDirectory;
621  bool is_rooted = Path.IsPathRooted (assemblyLocation); // is assemblyLocation defined as a full path
622  if (is_rooted)
623  proc.StartInfo.FileName = assemblyLocation;
624  else
625  proc.StartInfo.FileName = processPath;
626 
627  proc.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false;
628  proc.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true;
629  proc.StartInfo.RedirectStandardError = true;
630  string argumentFormat = "--internal-debug=echo {0} MARK";
631 
632  proc.ErrorDataReceived += (sender, arg) => {
633  if (arg.Data != null) {
634  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.MPIInfo, arg.Data);
635  } };
636 
637  List<string> tests = new List<string> ();
638  if (options.install_path != null)
639  tests.Add (options.install_path);
640  if (Options.mpirun_path != null)
641  tests.Add (Options.mpirun_path);
642 
643  // Select converter for current OS
644  ExecTools.ArgConverter converter = ExecTools.converter ();
645 
646 
647  // http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/system.environment.getcommandlineargs.aspx
648  // http://blogs.msdn.com/b/twistylittlepassagesallalike/archive/2011/04/23/everyone-quotes-arguments-the-wrong-way.aspx
649  // http://blogs.msdn.com/b/oldnewthing/archive/2010/09/17/10063629.aspx
650  tests.Add ("foobar");
651  tests.Add ("alpha with spaces");
652  tests.Add ("foo\"bar");
653  tests.Add ("foo'bar");
654  tests.Add (@"'alpha");
655  tests.Add (@"beta'");
656  tests.Add (@"\alpha");
657  tests.Add (@"\\alpha");
658  tests.Add (@"\\\alpha");
659  tests.Add (@"\\beta");
660  tests.Add (@"\\""alpha");
661  tests.Add (@"""beta");
662  tests.Add ("a\"b");
663  tests.Add ("a\"b\"");
664  tests.Add ("a\"b\" ");
665  tests.Add ("a\"b\" c");
666  tests.Add ("a;b&c");
667  tests.Add (" @a!b<c|\t&d&\t|>c!b@a ");
668  tests.Add (@"malicious-argument^&whoami");
669  tests.Add (@"malicious-argument^""&whoami");
670  tests.Add (@"malicious-argument\^&whoami");
671  tests.Add (@"^""malicious-argument\^""&whoami^""");
672  tests.Add (@"C:\Program Files\Test");
673  tests.Add ("/path/with spaces");
674 
675  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "\tTest : [data] => [converted] => [check data]");
676  bool has_failed = false;
677  foreach (string key in tests) {
678  proc.StartInfo.Arguments = String.Format (argumentFormat, converter (key));
679  try {
680  proc.Start ();
681  string output = proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd ();
682  string diagnostic = "Passed";
683  if (key != output) {
684  diagnostic = "FAILED";
685  has_failed = true;
686  }
687  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "\t{3} : [{0}] => [{1}] => [{2}]", key, converter (key), output, diagnostic);
688  } catch (Exception e) {
689  has_failed = true;
690  Logger.log (Logger.Channel.Debug, "\tFAILED => [{0}] => [{1}] : {2}", key, converter (key), e.Message);
691  }
692  }
693  if (has_failed)
694  throw new LauncherException ("Internal Debug Test has failed");
695  else
696  throw new ExitException ("Internal Debug Test finished successfully");
697  }
698 
699  }
700 }
ApplicationLauncher.ExitException
Definition: Launcher.cs:42
ApplicationLauncher.HelpException
Definition: Launcher.cs:52
ApplicationLauncher.InternalException
Definition: Launcher.cs:32
ApplicationLauncher.LauncherException
Definition: Launcher.cs:22
ApplicationLauncher.Launcher
Definition: Launcher.cs:63
Mono.Options.OptionException
Definition: Mono_Options.cs:483
Mono.Options.OptionSet
Definition: Mono_Options.cs:523

Definition: Launcher.cs:81
Application.IAction
Definition: Application.cs:17
Application.ILoader
Definition: Application.cs:9
ApplicationLauncher
Definition: AssemblyResolver.cs:7
Application
Definition: Application.cs:8
LawCompiler.Type
Type
Definition: Law.cs:158
Mono.Options
Definition: Mono_Options.cs:151
Mono
Definition: Mono_Options.cs:151
